name: kudbee-recording-it
description: Kudbee Recording It — a privacy-first, 100% client-side, mobile-first browser screen recorder. This package holds the typed Web Worker / WASM infrastructure (ffmpeg.wasm, Whisper, MediaPipe, Tesseract OCR, OpenCV.js) that powers the recorder's post-capture pipeline. Builds with Vite, scoped to /recording-it/; the rest of the Kudbee site remains zero-build.
